Prefect '''Dooje Brolo''' was in command of the third [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] in the first invasion force of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He also commanded a thousand [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. Brolo was killed as [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used [[shieldship]]s to melt the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] base [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Helska IV]].
